scripts.ensure-sidecar: bash -c 'TARGET=$(rustc -vV | grep host | cut -d" " -f2) && EXT="" && case "$TARGET" in *windows*) EXT=".exe" ;; esac && [ -f "src-tauri/binaries/DepotDownloader-${TARGET}${EXT}" ] && echo "Sidecar binary exists for ${TARGET}" || bash scripts/download-sidecar.sh'
scripts.build: bun run ensure-sidecar && tsc && vite build
